charter.mission: Test whether a no-leak direct-return ranker can outperform the existing classifier-style aggressive and neutral lines on the same lawful 10-row CPO layer.
in_scope: comparison versus oracle, aggressive, and neutral tracks
success_criteria: it produces an explicit portfolio trace
it reports whether ranking adds value beyond current classifier tracks

interpretation: V1.12BI is the first direct ranking experiment after the aggressive and neutral classifier lines were established.
It tests target-function alignment rather than simply adding a heavier model family.
